The IBA Release System powered by Aggie gives artists structure, accountability, and execution tools to grow real fanbases.

Leadership

Decades of experience in artist development, marketing, and release strategy.

Keyz the Producer

Founder, Icon Breaking Agency · Artist Development Strategist

Keyz the Producer has become a respected authority in modern music marketing and artist development, known for guiding artists on how to grow across platforms like Spotify, Instagram, and TikTok. Since 2018, he has built a reputation as a go-to expert for rollout strategy, social media growth, and fanbase building, reaching more than two million people annually through his educational content and industry insights.

Book Appointment →

Max Gousse

Music Executive & Strategic Advisor

Max Gousse's career spans nearly forty years across top institutions including East West Records, MCA Music Publishing, Epic/Sony Records, Music World Entertainment, and The Island Def Jam Music Group. He has contributed to major projects for Beyoncé — including I Am… Sasha Fierce, B'Day, and The Dreamgirls soundtrack — as well as work with Rihanna, Jay-Z, Saweetie, Solange, Kelly Rowland, YG, Ty Dolla $ign, and more.

Book Appointment →

Keyz the Producer and Max Gousse bring decades of proven impact to the music industry, combining elite creative expertise with deep executive experience. His background as both a producer and high-level A&R executive gives him a rare dual perspective on creative development and commercial success, making him one of the most trusted figures in the industry.

Exclusive Founding Member Onboarding

A focused, action-first onboarding call.

An industry pro listens to your release goals, critiques your strategy, and gives concrete next steps you can implement immediately. This is not generic advice — it's hands-on feedback tailored to your track, timeline, and audience.

Limited-time offer: founding members receive a private, strategic review of their release plan with Keyz the Producer or Max Gousse.
Apply For Founding 100 Access →

More Details

  • 01.One 60-minute live session
    With Keyz the Producer or Max Gousse
  • 02.Collaboration & placement guidance
    Feature strategy, playlist pitching priorities, and influencer outreach ideas
  • 03.Deep review of your release strategy
    Single/album rollout, timing, lead single choice, and promotional sequencing
  • 04.Practical deliverables
    A concise action plan with prioritized next steps and a follow-up checklist
  • 05.Marketing & positioning feedback
    Messaging, target audience, and organic vs. paid mix
  • 06.Optional recording
    A session recording for later reference
